StackPanel.TextBlock:
Well done on making it to the end of Calculus of Conflict. This set of missions has been a combined effort from community members iblank, Ian Roberts, and Neu. Thank you to them for making it and you for playing it!
Why not try going back and playing the other side of Bargaining Chips? We've had a lot of fun making these missions and we'd love for you to play them all.
